name: I missed some work due to tinnitus, what benefits apply?
description: TTD for lost wages during recovery.[1]

mainEntity.name: I missed some work due to tinnitus, what benefits apply?

acceptedAnswer.text: TTD for lost wages during recovery.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Temporary total disability (TTD) pays 2/3 wages while unable to work, plus medical for treatment.** Requires doctor excuse linking to noise exposure.[1][4] PPI follows recovery. Track all days off. Insurers scrutinize; solid proof needed.[2] Combine with permanent awards.
